response: 359 is a prime number. It is not divisible by any primes up to its square root (≈18.95), such as 2, 3, 5, 7, 11, 13, or 17.
reasoning_content: We need to check if 359 is a prime number. Quick sanity check: Check divisibility by small primes. 359 is odd, not divisible by 2. Sum of digits 3+5+9=17, not divisible by 3. Last digit is 9, not 0 or 5, so not divisible by 5. Check 7: 7*51=357, 7*52=364, so 359-357=2, not divisible. Check 11: 11*32=352, 11*33=363, difference 7, not. Check 13: 13*27=351, 13*28=364, difference 8, not. Check 17: 17*21=357, 17*22=374, difference 2, not. Check 19: 19*18=342, 19*19=361, difference -2, so not. Check 23: 23*15=345, 23*16=368, difference 14, not. Check 29: 29*12=348, 29*13=377, difference 11, not. Check 31: 31*11=341, 31*12=372, difference 18, not. Next prime is 37: 37*9=333, 37*10=370, difference 26, not. 41: 41*8=328, 41*9=369, difference 10, not. 43: 43*8=344, 43*9=387, difference 15, not. 47: 47*7=329, 47*8=376, difference 30, not. 53: 53*6=318, 53*7=371, difference -12, not. 59: 59*6=354, 59*7=413, difference 5, not. 61: 61*5=305, 61*6=366, difference -7, not. 67: 67*5=335, 67*6=402, difference 24, not. 71: 71*5=355, 71*6=426, difference 4, not. 73: 73*4=292, 73*5=365, difference -6, not. 79: 79*4=316, 79*5=395, difference -36, not. 83: 83*4=332, 83*5=415, difference 27, not. 89: 89*4=356, 89*5=445, difference 3, not. 97: 97*3=291, 97*4=388, difference -29, not. We need to check up to sqrt(359) which is about 18.95, so primes up to 19. Actually sqrt(359) ≈ 18.947, so we only need to check primes up to 17. But we already checked up to 17: 2,3,5,7,11,13,17. None divide. So 359 is prime. Quick sanity check: 359 is indeed a prime number. Answer: prime.
